title: TriggerConfig
description: Trigger Configuration schema for agentflow daemon

triggers.description: List of configured triggers to run daemon workflows

name.description: Unique identifier name for this trigger

schedule.description: Standard 5-field cron schedule expression (only required for cron type, e.g. '*/5 * * * *')

watchPath.description: File or folder path to watch for modifications (only required for fs-watch type)

gitDir.description: Git repository root directory (only for git-hook type, defaults to current dir)

watchRef.description: Git ref path to watch for commits (only for git-hook type, e.g. 'refs/heads/main')

recipe.description: The name of the recipe to execute (e.g., 'security-review')

sprintDirPattern.description: Optional custom format pattern to derive the sprint folder name
